top_signals.title: Mizuho Says Historic Slump in Yen Is Defying the Rates Rulebook
top_signals.summary: The slump in the yen to historic lows is forcing investors to rethink one of their most widely used strategies to gauge the currency’s moves, according to Mizuho Bank Ltd.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Failed World Cup bet sinks South Korean media giant’s Disney dream
top_signals.summary: From soju-fueled film festival parties to court-led restructuring, a South Korean content powerhouse’s mistimed global expansion and ill-judged bets on World Cup soccer and Olympic rights ended up derailing its dream of becoming the country's Disney.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
